case_title: PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. TIRE SALES & LEASING COMPANY, INC. et al

calendar.matters:
MOTION To Amend Judgt
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. (Judgment debtor's name to be changed from William Holman to William Holmen). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
